function_name: 【流程】给当前任务明细上的客户重新发起D1任务
remark: 给当前任务明细上的客户重新发起D1任务
body:
/**
 * @author 纷享-刘喆斌
 * @codeName 【流程】给当前任务明细上的客户重新发起D1任务
 * @description 给当前任务明细上的客户重新发起D1任务
 * @createTime 2026-03-26
 * @bindingObjectLabel 任务明细
 * @bindingObjectApiName task_detail__c
 * @函数需求编号
 */

String dataId = context.data.customer__c as String;
List taskOwner = context.data.owner as List;
List partnerList = context.data.field_62Dh4__c as List; //

// 查询第一个21D任务
def (Boolean error, Map data, String errorMessage) = Fx.object.findOne("rhythm_task__c", //对象apiName
        FQLAttribute.builder()
                .columns(["_id", "name","task_interval__c","task_content__c","business_process_id__c"]) //需要返回的字段
                .queryTemplate(QueryTemplate.AND(["task_mark__c": QueryOperator.EQ("D1")],["rhythm_task_type__c": QueryOperator.EQ("option_21d_cadence__c")])) //查询条件
                .build(),
       SelectAttribute.builder()
                .build())
if (error) {
    log.error("未发现首个任务：" + errorMessage)
    return
} else {
    def map = data as Map
    Integer interval = map["task_interval__c"] as Integer
    String nextTaskTime = TaskDetailUtil.nextWorkingDay(DateTime.now() + interval.days)
    Date nextDate = Date.of(nextTaskTime)
    //创建任务明细
    Map taskDetail = [
      "task_period_start_date__c": Date.now(),
      "task_material__c": map["task_content__c"],
       "task_status__c":"option_unassigned__c",
      "task_cycle_end_date__c":  Date.now(),
      "customer__c": dataId,
      "owner": taskOwner,
      "field_62Dh4__c": partnerList,
      "record_type": "record_on6h0__c",
      "this_task_configuration__c": map["_id"]
    ]
   def taskDetailRet = Fx.object.create("task_detail__c", taskDetail, null, CreateAttribute.builder().build()).result() as Map
   log.info("任务明细创建结果："+taskDetailRet)
}

function_name: 【流程】给新建未注册客户发起第一个21D任务
remark: 给新建未注册客户发起第一个21D任务
body:
/**
 * @author 纷享-刘喆斌
 * @codeName 【流程】给新建未注册客户发起第一个21D任务
 * @description 给新建未注册客户发起第一个21D任务
 * @createTime 2026-03-24
 * @bindingObjectLabel 客户
 * @bindingObjectApiName AccountObj
 * @函数需求编号
 */
String dataId = context.data._id as String;
List taskOwner = context.data.owner as List;
List partnerList = context.data.field_62Dh4__c as List; //

// 查询第一个21D任务
def (Boolean error, Map data, String errorMessage) = Fx.object.findOne("rhythm_task__c", //对象apiName
        FQLAttribute.builder()
                .columns(["_id", "name","task_interval__c","task_content__c","business_process_id__c"]) //需要返回的字段
                .queryTemplate(QueryTemplate.AND(["task_mark__c": QueryOperator.EQ("D1")],["rhythm_task_type__c": QueryOperator.EQ("option_21d_cadence__c")])) //查询条件
                .build(),
       SelectAttribute.builder()
                .build())
if (error) {
    log.error("未发现首个任务：" + errorMessage)
    return
} else {
    def map = data as Map
    Integer interval = map["task_interval__c"] as Integer
    String nextTaskTime = TaskDetailUtil.nextWorkingDay(DateTime.now() + interval.days)
    Date nextDate = Date.of(nextTaskTime)
    //创建任务明细
    Map taskDetail = [
      "task_period_start_date__c": Date.now(),
      "task_material__c": map["task_content__c"],
     // "allocation_time__c": DateTime.now(),
     // "task_status__c":"option_already_assigned__c",
       "task_status__c":"option_unassigned__c",
      "task_cycle_end_date__c":  Date.now(),
      "customer__c": dataId,
      "owner": taskOwner,
      "field_62Dh4__c": partnerList,
      "record_type": "record_on6h0__c",
      "this_task_configuration__c": map["_id"]
    ]
   def taskDetailRet = Fx.object.create("task_detail__c", taskDetail, null, CreateAttribute.builder().build()).result() as Map
   log.info("任务明细创建结果："+taskDetailRet)
}

function_name: 任务明细页面加载
remark: 1. 分配时间和任务状态只读
body:
/**
 * @author 纷享-刘喆斌
 * @codeName 任务明细页面加载
 * @description 1. 分配时间和任务状态只读
 * @createTime 2026-02-26
 * @bindingObjectLabel 任务明细
 * @bindingObjectApiName task_detail__c
 * @函数需求编号
 */

  UIEvent event = UIEvent.build(context) {
   //把字段设置为只读、隐藏、必填
   editMasterFields "task_status__c" readOnly(true) 
   editMasterFields "allocation_time__c" readOnly(true) 
   editMasterFields "task_period_start_date__c" readOnly(true) 
   editMasterFields "task_cycle_end_date__c" readOnly(true) 

  }

  return event
